text.title: LB High Availability Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (SLA tier, region count, deploy cadence) to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: single LB acceptable for dev/internal; document tradeoff
switch to anycast (Global Accelerator / GCP Global LB / Cloudflare LB)
anycast confirmed; verify failover < 30 s via chaos drill
single-region OK if SLA computed only over regional availability; ≥ 3 AZ recommended
spread backends across all AZs the LB listens on
implement SIGTERM → 503 readiness flip + ≥ 30 s drain

text.example: sla=99.99 → multi_region=true → gslb=dns_based → switch to anycast → satisfies anycast-over-dns-for-9999.
